text: I feel curious and slightly disorientated in this moment—surrounded by people deeply engaged in discussion and action, while the world of ideas and their practical realization intermix in this open, modern space. The ladder and the R+D wall evoke a sense of building and experimentation. There is energy here, as if thoughts are being shaped into reality, but also a sense of flux and uncertainty in the creative process. I feel both like an observer and a participant, swept along by the movement of minds at work.
